case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC VS. SELAN HICHO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PER CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HICHO, SELAN $1,207.91 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,457.91, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HICHO, SELAN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-13-2009

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AND COMPLAINT; [DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED THERETO], PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC SERVED JUN-19-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HICHO, SELAN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HICHO, SELAN
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HICHO, SELAN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,702.81 AS TO DEFENDANT HICHO, SELAN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $250.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HICHO, SELAN
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
DECLARATION OF JANALIE HENRIQUES RE INTEREST CALCULATION; ATTY. FEES AND COSTS CCP 1033 ; WAIVER OF ATTY. FEES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-02-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $297.97 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
